summary: Iteration 37: Pre-launch Fixes Testing - All 4 features verified. Backend 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend all tests passed. (1) Onboarding link uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not localhost, (2) pay_type and monthly_salary fields work in staff management, (3) Strict 10m geofencing returns HTTP 403 for far coordinates, (4) My Pay page at /heva-ops/pay shows week/month hours and pay.
critical_code_review_comments: RestaurantSettings.js Line 179: Onboarding link correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
RestaurantSettings.js Lines 853-856: Pay Type dropdown with 'hourly' and 'monthly' options, dynamically shows Hourly Rate or Monthly Salary field
attendance.py Lines 32-33: GEOFENCE_RADIUS_METERS=10, Lines 53-58: Strict enforcement returns HTTP 403 with distance message
attendance.py Lines 188-253: my-summary endpoint returns pay_type, hourly_rate, monthly_salary, week/month hours/pay
StaffMyPay.js: Full page component with week-hours-card, week-pay-card, month-hours-card, month-pay-card, recent-records-card
App.js Line 182: Route /heva-ops/pay maps to StaffMyPay component
StaffClockIn.js Lines 63-66: GPS error shows toast.error with location permission message
seed_data_creation: Created test staff members during testing (test_monthly_*, test_update_*, test_onboard_*) - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified all 4 pre-launch fixes: (1) Onboarding link in RestaurantSettings.js uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL - verified URL shows https://revenue-dash-33.preview.emergentagent.com/onboarding/... not localhost. (2) Staff management has pay_type dropdown (hourly/monthly) and shows Hourly Rate or Monthly Salary field based on selection - backend stores and returns these fields correctly. (3) Geofencing is strictly enforced: POST /api/attendance/clock returns HTTP 403 with distance message when coordinates are far from business location (tested with lat=0, lng=0), returns 400 when location missing for mobile_app, but succeeds for pos_terminal without location. (4) My Pay page at /heva-ops/pay shows staff name, position, pay type, week/month hours and pay, and recent clock records with Terminal/Mobile badges.

onboarding_link_not_localhost.evidence: Created staff, onboarding link dialog showed https://revenue-dash-33.preview.emergentagent.com/onboarding/... NOT localhost

pay_type_dropdown_in_staff_form.evidence: Add Staff dialog has Pay Type dropdown with 'Hourly' and 'Monthly (Salaried)' options

monthly_salary_field_conditional.evidence: When Pay Type is 'monthly', Monthly Salary field appears; when 'hourly', Hourly Rate field appears

backend_staff_pay_fields.evidence: POST /api/restaurant/staff with pay_type=monthly, monthly_salary=3000 creates staff correctly; PUT updates work

geofence_rejects_far_coordinates.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock with lat=0, lng=0 returns HTTP 403 with 'You are Xm away' message

geofence_rejects_missing_location.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock without lat/lng for mobile_app returns HTTP 400 'Location required'

geofence_skipped_for_terminal.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock with entry_source=pos_terminal succeeds without location

my_summary_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/attendance/my-summary returns pay_type, hourly_rate, monthly_salary, week_hours, month_hours, week_pay, month_pay

my_pay_page_renders.evidence: StaffMyPay page at /heva-ops/pay renders with all required cards: week-hours-card, week-pay-card, month-hours-card, month-pay-card, recent-records-card

staff_clock_in_page.evidence: StaffClockIn page at /heva-ops/clock renders with live clock, status badge, PIN pad, and last action info

login_page_renders.evidence: Login page shows EMAIL OR USERNAME and PASSWORD fields with Sign In button
